questions.prompt: Which artefacts are part of an audit pull for application-control coverage? (Select all that apply.)
choices: Coverage proof: which endpoints, which mode, since when
Activity evidence: True denies for the period, summarised and row-level
Change history: who modified policies and why
Exception register: documented divergences from the baseline
A signed certification by the auditor that the customer is compliant
questions.explanation: Coverage, activity, change history, and exceptions together form the evidence pack. The auditor's certification is their output, not the MSP's deliverable; don't claim certification on the customer's behalf.
